details.test: Task 1: Book cheapest weekend chalet with hot tub under $250/night within 5 km
Task 2: Compare two chalets between $180-$220 and favorite higher-rated one
Task 3: Book 5-night pet-friendly 3+ bedroom chalet under $2000 total
Task 4: 3-day grocery order with 5 items and chalet fridge stocking delivery
Task 5: Winter gear bundle with free shipping, rating 4.5+, subtotal < $180
Task 6: Fireplace and game night package with chalet delivery
Task 7: Purchase two digital chalet gift vouchers and reach payment page
Task 8: Add stay extras under $120 per adult for 2 adults
